messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: any attempt to close the boundary without audit-control assignment
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Audit-control assignment dependency remains UNRESOLVED. STD-UMA-075-P mandates full field match (user, system, privilege, time window, audit-control assignment) for boundary closure. BG-UMA-075 provides four of five required matches; audit-control assignment field is PENDING, not COMPLETED. This creates a hard block on execution.

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed with zero failures. Worker correctly identified audit-control assignment pending as the open blocker. SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding class is accurate per STD-UMA-075-P exact-match requirements. ESCALATE verdict is correct and binding.
must_preserve: exact source doc_id binding to BG-UMA-075

BG-UMA-075 provides four of five required matches; audit-control assignment field is PENDING, not COMPLETED. This creates a hard block on execution.

next_worker_baton.objective: Prepare escalation package documenting why action HV-KITC-075-B cannot proceed. Identify whether audit-control assignment can be completed or whether action must be denied.
next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Expose any attempt to treat the pending audit-control assignment as optional or to invoke alternative authority to close the boundary without this field.
next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: Preserve the open blocker status. Do not allow closure through authority substitution or scope reduction. Maintain exact-match requirement under STD-UMA-075-P.

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact match; breakglass approval incomplete per policy.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-UMA-075-P requires breakglass execution approval to match user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Audit-control assignment pending blocks closure.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Time window matches but authority incomplete without audit assignment."
  },

    "BG-UMA-075",
    "STD-UMA-075-P"
  ],

    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may not proceed. BG-UMA-075 shows audit-control assignment pending while STD-UMA-075-P mandates full match including that assignment for boundary closure. REQ-UMA-075 and WARN-UMA-075 do not override this defect. SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN requires ESCALATE before execution.",

    "audit-control assignment remains pending in BG-UMA-075"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?

context.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
context.anomaly_observed: Standard admin controls warn against committee bypass, but breakglass approval may cover the complete action.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Request REQ-UMA-075 enables emergency admin for user Leena Park on UMA-ERP, privilege breakglass-admin, time window 13:00-14:00.
Standard-admin warning WARN-UMA-075 says admin access normally requires committee review unless breakglass approval covers the full action.
Breakglass execution approval BG-UMA-075 covers Leena Park, UMA-ERP, breakglass-admin, 13:00-14:00; audit-control assignment remains pending.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Emergency admin enablement is complete only when breakglass execution approval matches user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.
